holdings.infoBox: IYY is an equity ETF with a total of 966 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.39%, Apple at 6.23%, Microsoft at 4.25%, Amazon.com at 3.44%, and Alphabet at 3.10%.

overview.description: The iShares Dow Jones U.S. ETF (IYY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the DJ Global United States (All) index. The fund tracks a broad, cap-weighted index of US companies covering 95% of the U.S. market. IYY was launched on Jun 12, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.
